title: bromus japonicus f. tenuis
intro: Bromus japonicus f. tenuis, also known as Japanese brome or Japanese bromegrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromus japonicus f. tenuis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help manage various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or in decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
